content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Mixed market with Nifty flat, Bank Nifty weak (-0.90%) and PSU Banks down -1.59%, while Energy (+0.92%) and Metals (+1.02%) lead. Book is 55% deployed with several positions near SL levels. VIX at 17.72 indicates elevated volatility. Priority is risk management on existing book — multiple positions are near or below SL and need attention.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24180
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 1200,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position at -3.5% with PSU Bank index down -1.59% today and price below entry by ~3.5%. Stock has rallied hard from Rs 64 to Rs 82 then pulled back. CMP Rs 78.52 is dangerously close to SL Rs 76.50. PSU bank cluster is the weakest sector today and FII outflows persist. Cut the loss now rather than risk SL trigger lower. Capital preservation."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1032.38,
      "new_target": 1095.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "No-op skip — current SL Rs 1032.38 is already above breakeven (entry Rs 984) protecting +4.9% gain. Trail rule: at +6.7% unrealized, the trail level max(entry, last - 2%) = max(984, 1025.9) = 1025.9. Current SL 1032.38 is already TIGHTER than that trail level, so no modify needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position at -1.5%, well above SL Rs 119. Gold near-term momentum bearish post-March correction but long-term outlook constructive (JPM target $5,000/oz). Holding as portfolio hedge against equity volatility. SL Rs 119 still appropriate — no change."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1420.00,
      "new_target": 1465.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position at +1.8%, hit fresh 52-week high today on FMCG strength after blowout Q4 (PAT +27%, revenue +22.6%). Tightening SL slightly from Rs 1418 to Rs 1420 (just above entry Rs 1412.94) to lock in breakeven. Target Rs 1465 unchanged — Axis Direct has TP Rs 1640 so room exists."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 406.00,
      "new_target": 425.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position at +1.2%, current SL Rs 406 already above entry Rs 404.50 (breakeven protected). Stock made 52-week high yesterday and pulled back to Rs 408. Q4 results in mid-May are catalyst. SL already at trail level (entry+); no further tightening warranted given proximity. Marking as HOLD effectively — keeping current SL/target."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 28,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position at -2.6%, CMP Rs 1754 is approaching SL Rs 1775 — wait, SL is ABOVE CMP. Stock gapped up to Rs 1816 then sold off hard to Rs 1746. Bearish supplementary research: stock up 39% in April, P/E 26.6x, average analyst target Rs 1422 implying 16% downside. Price has broken below SL level intraday (low Rs 1746 < SL Rs 1775). Exiting now before further damage. Major reversal candle today after parabolic run."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1740.00,
      "new_target": 1830.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position at +1.2% on Organon acquisition news catalyst. SL Rs 1740 already above entry Rs 1734 — breakeven locked. 5.3x volume surge confirms institutional buying. Combined entity becomes top-25 global pharma. Keeping SL/target unchanged — effectively HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position at -0.3%, marginal drift. SL Rs 318 is being tested intraday (low Rs 317.65). Q4 results May 19 is catalyst. Defensive transmission utility. Holding SL Rs 318 — if breached, exit triggers automatically. Target Rs 335 intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TATAPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN BUY order at Rs 443 still pending. Power cluster already overweight (NTPC + POWERGRID + TORNTPOWER exiting). With TORNTPOWER exit, power cluster will be lighter. However, with deployment hysteresis and the day's defensive posture, not adding to this order. Leaving the pending order as-is for now — will reassess if it doesn't fill."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "PSU bank cluster weakness, position approaching SL, capital preservation priority"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1032.38,
      "reasoning": "SL already above breakeven and tighter than trail level; no change needed"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Hedge position, well above SL"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1420.00,
      "reasoning": "Lock in breakeven on 52-week high breakout"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 406.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already at breakeven+; awaiting Q4 catalyst mid-May"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Sharp reversal from 52-week high, intraday low breached SL, valuation stretched, exit before further drawdown"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1740.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already above entry; Organon catalyst still playing out"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 318.00,
      "reasoning": "Marginal drift; SL being tested but holding; will exit on actual SL breach"
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "NLCINDIA strong setup near 52-week high on 2.7x volume in PSU power but cluster overweight. CPSEETF compelling breakout (NAV at 52w high) but PSU concentration risk overlaps with held positions. SUNPHARMA-style catalyst plays preferred over breakout chasing today. CUB and NAM-INDIA are quality earnings setups to monitor for next session if market stabilizes. Avoid PSU banks, avoid adding to power cluster post-TORNTPOWER exit.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Defensive day — exiting two losing/risk positions (MAHABANK, TORNTPOWER) to free up ~Rs 145K capital and reduce sector cluster risk. Trailing SL on NESTLEIND to breakeven. Power cluster (NTPC + POWERGRID + pending TATAPOWER order) and financial cluster (PNBHOUSING) remain — watching for further deterioration. Win rate of 19% over 5 days is poor; need to be more selective on entries. Today's bias: NO new entries. Focus on letting good positions (PNBHOUSING, NESTLEIND, SUNPHARMA) work and cutting weak ones."
}
